characteristics.coat_type: Hairless variety or Powderpuff with soft double coat

description.overview: Chinese Crested come in two varieties: Hairless (with hair on head, feet, and tail) and Powderpuff (fully coated).
description.temperament: Chinese Crested are affectionate, playful, and devoted. They love being with their people.
description.health: Hairless variety prone to skin issues and dental problems. Need sun protection.
description.exercise: Low to moderate exercise needs. Short walks and indoor play.

best_for: Those wanting a devoted lap dog
verdict.summary: Unique, devoted companions in hairless or fluffy varieties. Chinese Crested are affectionate and apartment-perfect but need skin/dental care.
